name: Generation Faraday Max Lock
desc:
The Generation Faraday Max-Lock Magnetic bag is the ultimate solution for schools looking to secure smartphones and enforce distraction-free classrooms.

This premium bag combines advanced signal-blocking technology with the added security of a locking mechanism, preventing unauthorized access to the enclosed devices. Built with durable, waterproof materials and featuring a double roll magnetic seal, this bag ensures that students’ smartphones stay both offline and protected throughout the school day.

Designed to last 4+ school years, it provides schools with a long-term solution for managing smartphone use, while also offering enhanced security with its integrated locking feature. Compatible unlocking tools included with every purchase.
specs:
• Features Advanced Signal Blocking Technology – Faraday bags block all incoming and outgoing signals—preventing calls, texts, notifications, and even wireless headphone connections—creating a distraction-free environment for students.
  • Enhanced Locking Mechanism for Added Security – The integrated locking system is easily unlocked from a central base, providing secure storage for devices.
  • Convenient Unlocking Options – Each classroom is equipped with two central unlocking mechanisms or handheld unlockers, allowing quick and easy access to phones when needed.
  • Durable, Long-Lasting Design – Built with materials to repel water, dirt, and debris, providing protection. Designed to last 4+  school years, making it an ideal, cost-effective solution for schools.
  • Easy-to-Use Closure – The patented double roll closure, enhanced with a magnetic seal, ensures that phones remain securely stored and disconnected throughout the school day. Also available with a velcro or locking closure.
  • Spacious Interior – Fits a smartphone and a smartwatch, including those with protective cases.
  • Unique RFID & Serial Number Tracking – Every bag is equipped with an RFID tag and serial number, making it instantly traceable. This enables efficient assignment to students and gives administrators clear visibility for streamlined tracking and management.
    • Built-in RFID tag can also serve as a universal student identifier, helping streamline systems like lunch, transportation, attendance, and campus access.
Technical Product Specifications:
  • SKU – GFSB-MAX-LOCK
  • Tested & Certified Shielding – TitanRF Faraday Fabric meets MIL STD 188-125 and IEEE 299-2006 standards for proven signal-blocking effectiveness.
  • Waterproof Construction – Built with 600D and 420D TPU materials, which are strong, waterproof fabrics designed to repel water, dirt, and debris, ensuring long-lasting protection.
  • Protected by Patents and Design Registrations – US Utility Patent No. US11,166,532 B2; US Design Patent Application No. 30/012,553; US Provisional Utility Patent Application No. 63/841,995; EU Registered Design No. 015129730-0001; UK Registered Design No. 6498031.
care:
1. Place the smartphone inside the bag.
  2. Securely close the bag by rolling the top and using the magnetic seal.
  3. Clamp the locking clasp around the metal rectangular ring.
  4. The device will be fully shielded from wireless signals and protected from water and debris.
  5. To unlock the bag, press the bottom of the locking clasp against an unlocking tool.
  6. To clean, gently wipe away any residue with a soft, damp cloth. Avoid using a washing machine or heavy scrubbing to maintain bag integrity.

name: Generation Faraday Max Lock Custom Colors
desc:
The Generation Faraday Max-Lock Magnetic Bag is the ultimate solution for schools seeking to eliminate smartphone distractions—now available in custom colors, unique patterns, and even personalized with your school mascot or logo. Combining unmatched signal-blocking performance with a secure locking mechanism, this premium bag ensures smartphones stay offline and out of reach throughout the school day.

Made from durable, waterproof materials and featuring a double-roll magnetic seal, it’s designed to withstand 4+ years of daily use. Each bag includes compatible unlocking tools for seamless implementation. With the Generation Faraday Max-Lock, schools can promote focused learning environments while showcasing their identity and spirit.

Unmatched Signal Blocking. Unlimited Style.

name: Generation Faraday Max Magnetic
desc:
The Generation Faraday Max Magnetic offers unparalleled protection against wireless distractions, combining waterproof durability with advanced signal-blocking technology.

Ideal for daily use in K-12 and higher education classrooms, this bag keeps smartphones and mobile devices completely offline, preventing access to Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cell signals (including 5G), and more. With its patented double roll closure and magnetic seal, this bag not only ensures effective shielding but also protects devices from water, dirt, and daily wear.

Designed to last 4+ school years, this premium option is perfect for schools seeking a long-term, reliable solution to help students stay focused on their studies.
specs:
• Features Advanced Signal Blocking Technology – Faraday bags block all incoming and outgoing signals—preventing calls, texts, notifications, and even wireless headphone connections—creating a distraction-free environment for students.
  • Durable, Long-Lasting Design – Built with materials to repel water, dirt, and debris, providing protection. Designed to last 4+ school years, making it an ideal, cost-effective solution for schools.

  • Unique RFID & Serial Number Tracking – Every bag is equipped with an RFID tag and serial number, making it instantly traceable. This enables efficient assignment to students and gives administrators clear visibility for streamlined tracking and management.
    • Built-in RFID tag can also serve as a universal student identifier, helping streamline systems like lunch, transportation, attendance, and campus access.

name: Generation Faraday Pro Magnetic
desc:
The Generation Faraday Pro is built for durability, designed to handle the rigors of daily student use in K-12 classrooms. By blocking all wireless signals, it ensures that smartphones stay disconnected during class, allowing students to stay focused on their learning.

Made from water-resistant ballistic nylon and featuring two layers of high-shielding fabric, this bag is both tough and effective, ideal for schools looking for a long-term solution.

Available with avelcro or a magnetic closure, the Generation Faraday Pro is designed to match the needs of the school. Designed to last for 2-4 school years, this bag is perfect for students who need a reusable and reliable way to secure their devices.
specs:
• Features Advanced Signal Blocking Technology – Faraday bags block all incoming and outgoing signals—preventing calls, texts, notifications, and even wireless headphone connections—creating a distraction-free environment for students.
  • Durable, School-Ready Design – Built with a water-resistant ballistic nylon exterior for long-lasting use.
  • Spacious Interior – Fits a smartphone and a smartwatch, including those with protective cases.
  • Easy-to-Use Closure – Features a double roll and velcro seal, ensuring a secure closure while allowing easy access in specified zones or where allowed.
  • Transparent ID Sleeve – Includes a clear card slot for displaying student information or Student ID.
  • Unique RFID & Serial Number Tracking – Every bag is equipped with an RFID tag and serial number, making it instantly traceable. This enables efficient assignment to students and gives administrators clear visibility for streamlined tracking and management.
    • Built-in RFID tag can also serve as a universal student identifier, helping streamline systems like lunch, transportation, attendance, and campus access.

name: Generation Faraday Max Lock Tablet Bag
desc: Generation Faraday Max-Lock Tablet Bag – COMING SOON Secure and shield tablets with the Generation Faraday Max-Lock Tablet Bag. Featuring a locking mechanism and signal-blocking design, it's perfect for schools, workplaces, and field operations.

name: Generation Faraday Shielded Box
desc:
The Generation Faraday Shielded Box is the perfect solution for schools aiming to maintain distraction-free classrooms while securely storing phones. This premium signal-blocking box combines advanced shielding technology with a durable, hard-sided design to keep devices offline, protected, and securely locked.

Equipped with a locking mechanism, the box ensures that phones remain safely stored during class time, preventing unauthorized access. Its advanced signal-blocking feature not only keeps devices offline but also blocks disruptive rings, dings, and notifications, fostering a focused learning environment. Made with sturdy materials and a felt-lined interior, the box prevents scratches and protects devices, while its organized storage design allows for easy identification and retrieval of phones when needed.

As a reliable alternative to traditional signal-blocking methods, the Shielded Box offers superior durability, security, and accessibility, making it an essential tool for maintaining focus and minimizing distractions in modern classrooms.
specs:
• Secure and Lockable - Protects against unauthorized use.
  • 36-Phone Capacity - Foam insert with 36 numbered compartments for easy identification and retrieval.
  • Signal-Blocking - Ensures devices remain offline and distraction-free.
  • Foam and Felt-Lined Interior - Safeguards phones from scratches.
  • Organized Layout - Allows for easy retrieval of devices.
  • Durable Design - Built to last for daily use.
  • Dual Side Handles – For easy carry and transport.
  • Dimensions and Weight – 24 x 10 x 10 in (61.0 × 25.4 × 25.4 cm), 150 lb (9.1 kg)
  • SKU – GFSA-SB
care:
1. Placing Devices in the Box - Open the lid and place devices inside. Ensure all devices are fully inside before closing the lid for complete signal blocking.
  2. Locking Capability - A lock can be installed on the lid to ensure devices remain secure.
  3. Cleaning - Wipe down with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid excessive moisture to protect the shielding material.
  4. Storage & Handling - Keep in a stable location away from any access points or routers for optimal signal blocking.
  5. Signal Blocking Check - Periodically test the box’s effectiveness by placing a phone inside and calling it to ensure no signal penetration.

name: Generation Faraday Phone Drop Box
desc:
The Portable Phone Drop Box is a fully RF-shielded mobile storage cabinet engineered to eliminate phone-based distractions and protect device privacy in controlled environments. Integrated Faraday shielding throughout the entire cabinet blocks cellular, WiFi, and Bluetooth signals once devices are stored inside, preventing calls, texts, alerts, notifications, and all wireless communication.

Available in both a 4-drawer configuration with capacity for up to 144 phones and a 2-drawer configuration holding up to 72 phones, each drawer includes 36 numbered slots to support structured, high-volume device management without compromising security. Whether used in schools, after-school centers, testing environments, or organized events, it ensures devices remain offline, inaccessible, and securely contained for the duration of use.

Designed for both signal isolation and physical safety, the unit features a one-drawer-at-a-time anti-tilt system and smooth-rolling casters for stable, controlled mobility throughout your facility.
specs:
• 144-Phone Capacity, 4-Drawer Configuration – Standard model holds up to 144 phones total, with 36 individually numbered slots in each drawer for organized storage and retrieval.
  • Also Available in 2-Drawer Push Cart Configuration – Compact mobile unit with a total capacity of up to 72 phones, offering the same secure, RF-shielded storage in a smaller, easy-to-maneuver design.
  • Signal Blocking Protection– Fully integrated Faraday shielding lines the entire cabinet, blocking cellular, WiFi, and Bluetooth signals to prevent incoming and outgoing wireless communication while devices are stored.
  • Controlled Access Anti-Tilt System – Four drawers feature an anti-tilt mechanism that allows only one drawer to open at a time, preventing tipping while also enhancing security by limiting simultaneous access to stored devices.
  • Flexible Mobile Cart Design – Built as a durable rolling storage cart with heavy-duty casters, allowing easy movement between rooms and secure positioning with locking wheels.
  • Numbered Organization System – Each drawer features clearly labeled compartments numbered 1-36 to streamline collection, tracking, and efficient device return.
  • Secure Programmable Access Lock – The exterior cabinet is equipped with a secure lock featuring a programmable 4-digit code, allowing administrators to control and customize access.
  • Durable Institutional-Grade Build – Constructed from high-quality materials engineered to withstand daily use in schools, after-school centers, and structured environments.
  • Dimensions and Weight (4-Drawer Configuration) – 39 x 20 x 23 in (99.1 × 50.8 × 58.4 cm), 150 lb (68 kg)
  • SKU – GFSA-PSV-4 (includes 4 drawers) SKU – GFSA-PSV-2 (includes 2 drawers)
care:
1. Roll and Lock – Position the cart and lock the wheels.
  2. Store Phones – Open one drawer at a time, place devices in numbered slots, and close the cabinet fully to block signals.
  3. Lock Cabinet – Secure with the programmable 4-digit code until ready for return.
  4. Care – Wipe clean with a soft, damp cloth, periodically check drawers and lock for smooth operation, and store indoors in a dry environment.

name: Generation Faraday ClassKeeper Phone Storage System
Generation Faraday Unlocking Key
desc: The Generation Faraday Unlocking Key is a compact, easy-to-use tool designed to unlock Generation Faraday Max Lock bags. The cap unscrews to reveal the magnetic unlocking tool, allowing for fast, controlled unlocking whenever needed. Built for repeated use, it provides administrators and teachers with an efficient way to manage locked bags on the go. Lightweight and portable, the Unlocking Key comes with a neck lanyard for easy access.
specs:
• Magnetic Unlocking Mechanism – Easily opens the locking mechanism on Generation Faraday locking bags.
  • Compact and Durable Design – Crafted from high-quality materials to withstand heavy use in busy settings.
  • Portable With Attached Lanyard – Handheld size unlocking tool with attached neck lanyard allows staff to easily carry and unlock bags anywhere on the go.
  • Protective Cap – Prevents unintended magnetic attraction to the Unlocking Key and unscrews easily to expose the magnetic side when in use.
  • Universal Compatibility – Designed to work seamlessly with all Generation Faraday locking bags equipped with the MAX-LOCK system.
  • SKU – GFUD-KEY
care:
1. Remove Cap – Unscrew cap to access magnet.
  2. Unlocking a Bag – Hold the Generation Faraday Max Lock bag, press the Unlocking Key’s exposed magnet to the base of the bag’s magnetic lock until the lock releases.
  3. Cleaning – Wipe with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasives.

name: Generation Faraday Unlock Dock
desc: The Unlock Dock is a sleek and reliable magnetic unlocking station specifically designed for use with Generation Faraday locking bags. This compact station ensures seamless and efficient unlocking for high-traffic environments, such as schools or workplaces, where secure device management is a priority.
specs:
• Magnetic Unlocking Mechanism –  Simplifies the process of opening Generation Faraday locking bags, providing fast and secure access.
  • Compact and Durable Design – Crafted from high-quality materials to withstand heavy use in busy settings.
  • Non-Slip Base – Ensures stability during operation, making it easy for users to unlock bags without hassle.
  • Universal Compatibility – Designed to work seamlessly with all Generation Faraday locking bags equipped with the MAX-LOCK system.
  • Low Maintenance – Requires minimal upkeep for consistent and reliable performance.
  • SKU – GFUD-DOCK
care:
1. Placing the Unlock Dock – Position the Unlock Dock on a stable surface or mount it as needed. Ensure it is within easy reach for users.
  2. Unlocking a Bag – Align the Generation Faraday Max-Lock phone bag with the Unlock Dock and press gently to disengage the locking mechanism.
  3. Cleaning – Wipe the surface with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive materials.
  4. Storage – Keep in a clean, dry area when not in use. Avoid exposure to extreme heat or moisture.
  5. Security Considerations – If using in a restricted setting, consider pairing with the Tamper-Proof Cover or mounting solutions for controlled access.

name: Generation Faraday Handheld Unlock Dock
desc: The Handheld Unlock Dock is a durable, portable magnetic unlocking station for Generation Faraday locking bags. Designed for mobility and frequent use, it features a comfortable built-in handle and non-slip pads for stability. It delivers the same fast, secure unlocking as the standard dock—perfect for schools, workplaces, and other environments requiring device management on the go.
specs:
• Magnetic Unlocking Mechanism - Simplifies the process of opening Generation Faraday locking bags, providing fast and secure access.
  • Compact and Durable Design - Crafted from high-quality materials to withstand heavy use in busy settings.
  • Portable With Built-In Handle - Comfortable handle allows staff to easily carry and unlock bags anywhere on the go.
  • Non-Slip Base - Ensures stability during operation, making it easy for users to unlock bags without hassle.
  • Universal Compatibility - Designed to work seamlessly with all Generation Faraday locking bags equipped with the MAX-LOCK system.
  • Low Maintenance - Requires minimal upkeep for consistent and reliable performance.
  • SKU - GFUD-HH-DOCK
care:
1. Placement and Use - Place on a stable surface or firmly hold in hand.
  2. Unlocking a Bag - Hold the Generation Faraday Max Lock bag, align with the dock, and press until the lock releases.
  3. Cleaning - Wipe with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasives.
  4. Storage - Keep in a clean, dry area away from extreme heat or moisture.

name: Generation Faraday Unlock Dock Podium
desc: The Unlock Dock Podium is a durable aluminum stand available in 2-way and 4-way configurations, designed for students to efficiently unlock Generation Faraday locking bags. Featuring Unlock Dock hubs on multiple sides, it enables fast, simultaneous access to locked devices. The podium includes a sturdy base and caster wheels for easy mobility and flexible positioning. Compatible with Tamper-Proof Covers (sold separately), this robust stand offers a durable, versatile solution to streamline device management.
usps: Supports Up to 4 Unlock Dock Hubs
Optional Tamper-Proof Cover and Caster Wheels
specs:
• Multi-Dock Capacity - Supports up to four Unlock Dock hubs, with optional tamper-proof covers, for streamlined and organized device management.
  • Customizable Positioning - Unlocking stations can be adjusted and configured to suit different workflows and locations with ease.
  • Ergonomic Height - The podium’s fixed height is engineered to suit student ergonomics, offering stability and consistent usability across varied classroom applications.
  • Mobile Design - Includes locking caster wheels for easy transport and secure placement, with optional removal.
  • Sturdy Construction - Built from durable materials to ensure stability and reliable performance during frequent use.
  • Professional Appearance - Sleek, modern design that integrates seamlessly into professional and educational settings.
  • SKU - GFUD-STAND-4WAY (includes 4 Unlock Docks) SKU - GFUD-STAND-2WAY (includes 2 Unlock Docks)
care:
1. Placement - Set on stable, level ground. If caster wheels are installed, lock them in place. Adjust height for comfortable reach.
  2. Unlocking a Bag - Hold the Generation Faraday Max Lock bag, align with the dock, and press until the lock releases.
  3. Cleaning - Wipe with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasives.
  4. Storage - Keep in a clean, dry area away from extreme heat or moisture.
  5. Security - For restricted settings, use a Tamper-Proof Cover for controlled access.

name: Generation Faraday Unlock Dock Tamper-Proof Cover
desc: The Tamper-Proof Cover is a standalone accessory designed to enhance the security of the Generation Faraday Unlock Dock. This lockable cover integrates seamlessly with the Unlock Dock, preventing unauthorized access to the unlocking mechanism while maintaining a professional and durable design. Ideal for schools, workplaces, or other environments requiring controlled access to Faraday locking bags.
specs:
• Independent Tamper-Proof Solution - Adds a layer of security to the Unlock Dock by restricting access to the unlocking mechanism.
  • Lockable Design - Features a key to ensure only authorized users can remove the cover.
  • High-Durability Materials - Crafted from tamper-resistant materials to withstand heavy use and deter unauthorized attempts.
  • Seamless Compatibility - Designed specifically to fit and function with the Generation Faraday Unlock Dock.
  • Simple Installation - Easy to attach and secure over the Unlock Dock for enhanced security without additional setup.
  • Portable and Adaptable - Can be moved and secured in different locations and installed into a variety of surfaces; mounting hardware not included.
  • SKU - GFUD-COVER
care:
1. Placement - Position against a secure, flat surface and attach using your own mounting hardware.
  2. Attach Dock - Secure the Unlock Dock to the cover using the predrilled holes and included screws.
  3. Access - Unlock the cover and open the door to use the dock.
  4. Unlocking a Bag - Hold the Generation Faraday Max Lock bag, align with the dock, and press until the lock releases.
  5. Cleaning - Wipe with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasives.
  6. Storage - Keep in a clean, dry area away from extreme heat or moisture.

name: Generation Faraday Phone Hotel
desc:
The Generation Faraday Phone Hotel offers educators and administrators an effective solution for managing cell phones in classrooms and other learning environments. Designed to work seamlessly with Generation Faraday bags, this organizer provides a secure and organized way to store up to 35 phones, keeping them shielded from wireless signals and out of students' hands during class.

Built with durability and practicality in mind, the Phone Hotel is equipped to withstand the demands of daily use in busy educational settings. Its transparent compartments allow for easy identification of devices using the ID card slots on the Faraday Bags. The organizer can be conveniently mounted using the grommets for wall installation or hung over doors with the included removable hangers, providing versatile placement options to suit any space.

Ideal for classrooms, testing centers, and group study areas, the Generation Faraday Phone Hotel helps maintain focus, reduce distractions, and support a structured and secure learning environment. Its heavy-duty construction ensures long-term usability, making it an indispensable tool for enforcing cell phone policies effectively.
specs:
• 35-Phone Capacity - Includes 35 individual compartments with large embroidered numbers, each perfectly sized to hold a Generation Faraday Bag with a phone inside. Compatible with all Generation Faraday Bag models.
  • Device Management Simplified - Keeps phones shielded, organized, and out of students' hands to enhance focus during school hours.
  • Classroom-Friendly Design - Features two top grommet holes and removable hangers allowing it to fit over a door or hang on a wall, making it easy to install and relocate as needed.
  • Classroom-Friendly Design - Features two top grommet holes and removable hangers allowing it to fit over a door or hang on a wall, making it easy to install and relocate as needed.
  • Heavy-Duty Construction - Built to support the weight of 30 devices with attached cases, plus withstand hard pulling and frequent use in high-traffic environments.
  • ID Card Window - The open window provides a clear view of the ID card slot on each Generation Faraday Bag, making it easy to enhance organization and quickly identify compartment contents.
  • RF Shielding Capability - When paired with Generation Faraday Bags, prevents cellular, WiFi, and GPS signals from penetrating, ensuring that devices remain silent and disconnected.
  • Versatile Use for Organized Phone Storage - Can also be used independently to store and organize cell phones without Generation Faraday Bags, with large cutout windows allowing teachers and students to identify the contents of each compartment.
  • SKU - GFSA-PH
care:
1. Hang the Phone Hotel on a wall or over the door.
  2. Generation Faraday bags can either stay stationed in their compartments for consistent organization or be easily removed if students need to carry them to other classes.
  3. The top of each bag extends slightly above the compartment, allowing for quick and effortless insertion or removal of devices while they remain housed in the Phone Hotel.
  4. To clean, gently wipe away any residue with a soft, damp cloth. Avoid using a washing machine or heavy scrubbing to maintain integrity.

name: Generation Faraday Class Phone Organizer
desc: The Generation Faraday Class Phone Organizer is a durable aluminum shelving unit compatible with all Generation Faraday Phone Bags. It features 30 compartments sized for easy access, with a design that prevents magnetic bags from sticking together during retrieval. The unit can be wall-mounted or placed on a table or floor. Predrilled side holes allow installation of Generation Faraday Unlock Docks (sold separately) when used with Max Lock bags. It can also be used without Generation Faraday Phone Bags by placing devices directly in the compartments. Engineered to keep devices organized and accessible, it supports efficient classroom management.
specs:
• 30-Phone Capacity – 30 phone size compartments perfectly sized to fit Generation Faraday Phone Bags.
  • Organized Layout – Allows for easy retrieval and monitoring of devices.
  • Flexible Mounting Design – Mount on a wall or use on a tabletop for versatile placement.
  • Unlock Dock Integration – Pre-drilled side holes for seamless installation of Generation Faraday Unlock Docks, enabling quick unlocking of Max Lock bags.
  • Robust Construction – Durable construction with a stable form factor measuring 35.8" L x 10" W x 20" H for reliable, long-term use.
  • SKU – GFSA-ORG
care:
1. Placing the Class Phone Organizer – Position the Class Phone Organizer on a stable surface or mount it on a wall using the included mounting plate (additional wall installation hardware not included). Ensure it is secure and within easy reach for users.
  2. Installing Unlock Docks – If desired, use the predrilled side holes to install Generation Faraday Unlock Docks (sold separately) when used with Max Lock bags.
  3. Cleaning – Wipe the surface with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive materials.

name: Generation Faraday Storage Hamper
desc:
The Generation Faraday Storage Hamper is a lightweight, portable, and collapsible storage solution designed to organize and transport Generation Faraday Phone Bags (or similar items) efficiently. Constructed from durable 600D polyester fabric with a removable internal pole structure, it maintains its shape while remaining easy to fold and carry.

With a 170L capacity, the hamper can hold up to 100–150 phone bags—ideal for schools, events, and facilities managing large volumes. It features wheels and side handles for smooth mobility, plus mesh side pockets for added convenience. The cinch string cover keeps contents secure during transport and storage.
specs:
• High Capacity – 170L volume fits approximately 100–150 Generation Faraday Phone Bags.
  • Lightweight Construction – Made from 600D polyester fabric with a removable internal pole structure that maintains shape while remaining easy to fold and carry.
  • Portable Design – Equipped with four plastic wheels and two side handles for easy transport.
  • Convenient Storage – Includes two mesh side pockets for accessories or small items.
  • Collapsible Frame  – Folds flat for compact, space-saving storage when not in use.
  • Secure Closure – Cinch string cover keeps contents contained and protected.
  • Versatile Applications – Perfect for schools, events, and facilities managing high quantities of phone bags or similar items.
  • Large Dimensions – 21.7 × 17.7 × 27.6 in (55 × 45 × 70 cm)
  • SKU – GFSA-HAMPER
care:
1. Assembly – Insert the removable poles before use to maintain full structure and shape.
  2. Loading – Distribute phone bags evenly to prevent tipping or uneven wear.
  3. Securing – Use the cinch string cover to keep contents contained during transport.
  4. Mobility – Roll using the plastic wheels on flat, smooth surfaces for best results.
  5. Cleaning – Wipe with a damp cloth or mild detergent; do not machine wash or tumble dry.

name: Generation Faraday Classroom School Bag Bin
desc:
The Generation Faraday Classroom Storage Bin is a durable, collapsible solution designed to streamline the storage and distribution of Generation Faraday Phone Bags. Built from rigid polypropylene (PP), it maintains its structure during daily use while remaining lightweight and easy to transport.

With a capacity of up to 36 phone bags (with or without devices inside), this bin helps classrooms stay organized and efficient during collection and return processes. Its open-top design allows for quick access, while integrated handles make it easy to move between classrooms or storage areas.

Ideal for schools, events, and facilities managing large volumes of phone bags, this bin offers a simple, space-saving way to keep devices secure and organized throughout the day.
specs:
• 36-Bag Capacity – Holds up to 36 Generation Faraday phone bags (empty or with devices inside).
  • Universal Compatibility – Works with all Generation Faraday phone bag models.
  • Lightweight and Portable – Easy to carry with two integrated side handles.
  • Collapsible Design – Folds flat for compact storage when not in use.
  • Durable Construction – Made from rigid PP plastic for long-term, daily use in school environments.
  • Built for Daily Use – Designed to handle the weight of fully loaded phone bags with devices without warping or collapsing.
  • Open Access Design – Wide, unobstructed top for quick loading and retrieval.
  • Ventilated Mesh Sides – Allows visibility of contents for easy inventory checks.
  • Dimensions – 17.3 × 13.0 × 9.1 in (44 × 33 × 23 cm)
  • Weight – 2.1 lb (970 g)
  • SKU – GFSA-BIN
care:
1. Insert Bags – Place Generation Faraday phone bags into the bin for organized storage and distribution.
  2. Transport as Needed – Use the built-in handles to move the bin between classrooms or storage areas.
  3. Collapse for Storage – Fold down the side walls to store flat when not in use.
  4. Care – Clean with a soft, damp cloth as needed.
